reviews.review_title: Do i need another rythm Game?
reviews.review_description:
A good Part of why i got my Meta Quest was Beat Saber. Easy to learn, Fun to play, many Songs and adjustable difficulty. So when i saw STARWAVE in the Shop, i was pretty sure i did not want this. Yet, the number of positive critics made me curious. And then i saw that i could play a 20 Minute Demo for free. Nothing to lose, i tried the demo and i found what Beat Saber had been missing: this Game adapts to my movement range. I am bigger than most people, and STARWAVE really makes me work to get high, low and far enough to catch the beats.

I got the Game, played it 8 Times so far, and i still feel better with my body in this than in Beat Saber.

So, do i needed another rythm Game? No, but i just feel a bit better with this one.

Play this game most days. It's a lot of pretty and immersive fun! if I could improve 2 things about this I would have a 90s uk house and rave galaxy and I would improve hitting the asteriods as that can feel random. Otherwise I love this simple game and will continue buying the dlc and play it everyday :D

I'm completely hooked on this game! It's an absolutely mind-blowing experience. Most rhythm games kinda feel samey, nothing really sets them apart - but STARWAVE is different! Never seen anything like it. 
Everything looks stunning and gorgeously animated - each trip through space matches the vibe of the track perfectly. 
You just can't stop playing. Pure magic.
Really hoping the devs keep supporting this project with fresh music packs and updates. The foundation here is too good to walk away from. It’s already earned a permanent spot in my regular rotation.
I had it but can no longer play why?!!!

This game feels familiar to the beat Saber likes, but in my opinion, it does enough to set itself apart in both mechanics and in musical genre. 

I’ve seen some comments about the difficulty, and I don’t think this game is meant to be a big challenge. 

If you’re somebody who wants to push yourself really hard with the rhythm game, this may not be for you 

It is however fun , and I even catch myself dancing along with the music. 

While there is replayability here, I do find the track list to be a little sparse. Just a little. 

They did add Another music pack to the game though it is pay world DLC personally, I think rhythm games go way out of control with the amount of paywall DLC they add and I really hope we see some more content and more songs from this game that aren’t paywall
Maybe it would be a good idea for them to allow players to upload songs

I highly recommend this if you like electronica style music and freestyle movement. It’s about finding your fun and flow, not challenge at the forefront. ￼

I love this app for the following reasons
1) it doesn’t bleed you dry with micro transactions and the one dlc is cheap 
2) it is positive feeling. You miss a star you keep going.
3) unlike beat saber I feel more active it gets my cardio going
4) it is visually beautiful. 
My only sadness is there are not more dlc galaxies and again so much cheaper then the competitors
Its a good workout it also is so beautiful the levels they have i can't wait until they release something new

reviews.review_title: Too easy - OK for a young player
reviews.review_description:
Wanted to like this but it has major flaws. The difficulty is far too low and does not adapt. It's too forgiving of any mistakes to the point of you can practically just wave your arms around and it make little difference. For a flow state it has to be at a challenge level you can meet and this was underchallenging for me. 
The core graphics are bland and unchanging - the same blue double stars, the same RGB rapid hit spheres, etc. Little to no variation (unlike the backgrounds) and no custom options.
The upside is this would probably be great for a young player who may find other games too difficult.

developer_response.body: Starwave approaches difficulty differently than many other titles. While it's easy for anyone to get through a level, to really score well requires real motion and precision - it's about how hard you swing and how in time with the music you are. If you try it with this in mind you may have a different impression! We put a lot of effort into making Starwave accessible to all, but with a real challenge if you want to achieve high scores. We'd love it if you give it another try and consider updating your review it if you notice the difference. Either way, thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
Great combination of Beat Saber and Synth Riders, with some unique game play elements!

The only thing on my wish list would be to add BHaptics support!

We are having a blast with this game it's far more fun than beat saber in my opinion the graphics are to die for well worth the price!!! Can't wait for more content from this game! 

You will enjoy trippy space trips great music and great for everyone in the family!!!
Great visuals, great music, and great gameplay! Game has a great UI and is very easy to pick up and play!
Run..don't walk to get this game. Don't even hesitate. The music is fire and it makes me work up a sweat. Issa vibe.
I love this the colors the music everything about it is very cool

I love the 10 minute daily challenge, it gets the heart rate up without even realizing it. 
The music is good and the visuals are beautiful.

Run, dont walk. BUY this game! Im so happy to have found this AWESOME game. Its so much fun and quite the workout. I love the adjustable settings. I enjoyed this one so much i immediately went for a second round. The scenery is incredible.  As an older adult the adjustments make it easier for me to actually be able to get a decent workout without over doing it.
I played the demo and just… was blown away. Time flew. I had so much fun and was awed by the environment. Had to get it!

First I must say this is my favorite game in vr so far, and I don't regret the purchase one bit,  it's like my mental health pill of the day. Raises my mood and can be a great workout. Always a joy to play. Some songs aren't perfectly synchronised and it annoys me at times when I'm following sound and visuals are a tad off. 
Not with every song tho, its pretty rare that that happens. I wish you guys added favorite function so I can play my favorite ones instead of Searching for the song. But overall this game is just stunning and uplifting.  Really amazing work.

Fantastic fun! the controls are neat and easy, the music is great if your into upbeat electronica. The visuals are fast and intensive. the performance on my 3s is fluid and accurate. The music meshes perfectly with the visuals and creates a perfectly stylised experience. I personally liked the choice of non mainstream music as I think it will not feel dated in 6 months time. I'd love to see even more variation on music styles in the add-on packs as i love goa trance etc, which I have no doubt I'll be picking up as they come out. The demo is a great example of what to expect and the price is very reasonable compared to more expensive similar products. So happy I opted for those over the others currently available. C:

Well, I paid $29.99... a month ago, ...now $10 dropped... Dang!   .... may I have $10 back,please....( so I could buy another game ).. overall great workout experiences, does not make my head dizzy(which is good, I only could do 2 sessions, thoo )
Fantastic game, needs new content, which hopefully is coming soon and I can’t wait.

This is my first purchase of a rhythm game (having never played Beat Saber and the many others).  I am extremely happy with this purchase.  It's just got the right amount of variation in the moves you perform (without being too complicated) and the music is designed to go with the game perfectly and really gets me into the groove.  Definitely can work up a sweat after even one song (I am not one that does any fitness routines).  I really highly recommend picking this up and getting into the groove.  Has lots to offer including random daily runs to keep it interesting (along with quite a long campaign as well).
I love this game!

“Mom, can we have Beatsaber?”
“No, we have Beatsaber at home.”
The Beatsaber at home:

reviews.review_title: Best Game I Bought this Year!
reviews.review_description:
Fun and gets my heart rate up. Sometimes I play with the game’s music which is really fun but for a change I sometimes turn the volume down and play to my own music. I love this game. The Facebook community for this game seems really nice too.

*Update: I've had this game for a month now. I play it every morning. This game puts me in a such a good mood. It's beautiful and never gets boring. My favorite Rhythm game hands down! One of my favorite parts of this game is you can hit the notes/ride the waves high over your head to raise your heart rate, as low as you want to work your legs and as wide as you want. The notes move with you and the sound of hitting your targets goes beautifully with the uplifting music!

Let me start off by saying !! I got starwave today !! And I got it because I’ve been playing beat saber and when I saw starwave I said oooh that looks fun so I got it but I didn’t know how much of a good workout I would get in after an hour !!!!!  I felt my arms burning !!  My calf’s burning I love how the Rhythm of  the music moves with you .

It is absolutely and amazing and beautiful experience when I opened up the tutorial I felt like I was floating I had an amazing experience I gasped of joy !! 🤩  and I love sparkles and the way everything was sparkles and had a good vibe I loved it !!  Also this game made me sweat so much and I havent sweated in a while even if I workout naturally so thank you !! I trully recommend the app it’s amazing !!

I’m a fitness & rhythm game enthusiast so this should be my jam. Instead, I already deleted after a day and wish I had skipped it. 
1. Lame music
2. Boring repetitive gameplay
3. Bad workout compared to others like supernatural or fit beats or body combat
4. Bad graphics (probably runs just as well on quest 1 as quest 3.)

reviews.review_title: Just tons of fun and good times!
reviews.review_description:
Starwave might look like just another Beat Saber clone, but it really is it’s own thing. The game offers 36 different songs in six different galaxies that all come with their own vibes and visual styles. The music is set in different subgenres of electronic music. So, no Pop Songs, Heavy Metal or other genres. If you don’t like electronic music, this isn’t for you. The visual style reminded me a lot of the PlayStation light gun shooter Child of Eden where you float through space with all kinds of colorful surroundings.

The mechanics aren’t unique in the genre but the way how they are implemented are very satisfying and well thought out. There are only four mechanics to memorize. Everything is very intuitive and responsive. Hitting the smaller balls needs a bit more practice than slicing the cubes in Beat Saber because they are considerably smaller. But it’s easy to get used to and there are no penalties or fail states for not hitting a light ball - only lower highscores. The only negative I’ve found is that the resolution of the game feels a bit low-res on the Quest 3. It could be sharper and more brilliant overall. I’ve played most of the VR music rhythm games and this is certainly one that vibed the most with me.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for this wonderful review, MrDeadshot! Means a lot to our team and so glad this vibed with you the most! <3

You mentioned that it visually reminds you of 'Child of Eden' -- and with good reason! Our co-creator worked on Child of Eden back in the day, and a lot of our team's visual inspiration does directly come from the work of Q Entertainment. :)

So very grateful again for the five-star review - and hoping that if you haven't joined us already, you'll join us on our Official STARWAVE Community on FB, or our Discord server. Links to both can be found here on playstarwave.com.

Hope to see you there, and thanks again for the support! 

Sincerely, 

Team STARWAVE (via J.S. and R.O.)

reviews.review_description: very good!

reviews.review_title: does not use the power of xr2 gen2 in Q3
reviews.review_description:
this developer didn't even bother to use the power of the newer xr2 gen 2. The game runs in default resolution 1680x1760 with 72hz on quest 3. this is not much higher than it runs on quest 2/pro with 1390x1584 (35%) with 72hz. but the xr2 gen 2 has ~2,5x gpu power of xr2 gen(+) 1, gpu and cpu are mostly sleeping at gpu/cpu-level 3.  as consequence the game looks more aliased and flickery than it had to be. i am really sick of devs that don't bother with finding the highest usable rendertarget or give the player the option for framerate and/or rendertarget. you already have not much computational power on standalonehmds and the power you have on newer hardware, some devolper just does not bother to use, even if their game as a release nearly a year after Quest3 release . instead they give you an aliased and flickery image and say: "live with it" .. if you don't want that you have to dial-in settings by yourself via adb or qgo. well made counterexample where you don' have to do that: red matter 2. they cared to squeeze the soc. if you are tired of beat saber and synth riders, MAYBE it is an option, but song variety is much less and you must like this taste, because you get much of the same.
some things i also don't like:
often too much particles.
the wands feel too short, if you accustomed to beat saber swords. 
there is also no customization how you hold the stick like in beat saber, a very basic feature for this type of game. 
rumble does not work on tips of the wands if you cross them, only if you go bit further down rumble starts. 
there are tons of blue orbs with nearly no variation(why not change the color per stage?). even in beat saber you have different blockcolors. 
hitboxes of the blue orbs feels wired, imho, i think they should be larger. i also hate the cyan comets that approach to you like a sneaky blue shell in mario kart and are equally annoying. you cannot see much and blue orbs come often directly after you have shaken you controllers like a mad man.
Love this game, it’s so beautiful and exciting to play, I even find it boosts my mood! It’s so much fun but also a really good workout!!!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.review_title: Poor cousin to Beat Saber & Synthriders
reviews.review_description: Swiping at orbs and thrusting sabers into star trails to 90’s disco music. The former isn’t nearly as satisfying as a clean sweep of a block in Beat Saber and the latter isn’t as validating as tracking those saberless trails in Synthriders between beats. With the music so monotonous it gets old incredibly fast and besides the colours the backdrop doesn’t vary nearly enough. Bit surprised by the raves reviews tbh.

reviews.review_title: Amazing, would love to see BHaptics!
reviews.review_description: What an AMAZING game. Beautiful, thoughtful and relaxing. Would love to see native support like BHaptics in the future!

reviews.review_title: Expected more & feel a little let down
reviews.review_description:
I really expected so much more from reading the reviews but I felt a little let down after buying it. Couldn't find any way to lower the intensity either. Maybe that's my fault but tutorial didn't mention intensity choices.  
Honestly, I kind of regret using my 40% off coupon on it.

reviews.review_title: Great music and visuals, sluggish input
reviews.review_description:
First of all the music is captivating, the visuals are great and the general feeling of the game captures the attention. The resolution is a little more on the lower end side on a Quest 3 and could be more crisp.
The main issue I have with this game is that compared to Beat Saber the Input somehow is a bit on the sluggish side.
Hitting all the notes/bubbles is really hard. The latency seem to be kinda off, so even as a versed Beat Saber player, this is hard to get it right. So many notes are almost impossible to hit, because the sabers are too slow to hit quick consecutives notes, especially when you move them up- and downwards.
The big bubble, which you have to hit almost a million times just is more of a hit or miss.
Additionally I would love to get more of a fluent playstyle, so your wrists won't get overexerted right on the first song, when you try to smash all the bubbles.
I think this game has big potential, but I recommend to wait with your purchase until it comes out of Beta.

reviews.review_title: Amazing. I like it more than beat saber.
reviews.review_description: Great workout and also very trippy 👌

reviews.review_title: An amazing way to start the day
reviews.review_description: As an avid conscious dance aficionado and VR workout pro, I absolutely love the combination of the two in Starwave. I love being able to move my body how it feels best for me rather than working to someone else's choreography. My only issue is its so easy to keep playing and my old body (75) can only handle just so much joyous movement at one time. I need to learn to pace myself better. Hats and cosmic bats off to the creators of this great app.

developer_response.body:
"AN AMAZING WAY TO START THE DAY"

It brings us so much joy to know this has become an uplifting part of your regular active lifestyle, and glad we're able to bring you a heaping helping of joyous movement! Thanks so much for your great review, and thanks for being a part of the Official STARWAVE Community! <3

- Team STARWAVE (via JS and RO)

reviews.review_description:
Visually it's stunning. But the music is of the cheapest, most generic, probably AI-generated sort. An acoustic experience that matches the visual one would greatly enhance the game.
The workout is surprisingly intense - but only for the upper, not the lower body. It makes the game, compared to other rhythm games, feel incomplete.

I love this app it's extremely energetic and the visuals are awesome 
I'm partially disabled and use this app sitting 
I played the demo for 5 minutes and loved it so much I purchased it straight away 
Sadly I can only give it 5 stars it deserves more 
Quite literally the best exercise app I've ever bought

developer_response.body:
WOW! Thanks for that review, Jimbo! We were so delighted that you found us on the store, then came into the Official STARWAVE Community on Facebook to join us all.

Hearing that it's working well for you while sitting is also wonderful news. We wanted to try to make the experience as flexible and as accessible as possible. Means the world to hear this from you, and excited to have you as a part of the Voyage! WELCOME!  
-- Team STARWAVE (via JJS)

reviews.review_description:
WOW! WOW! WOW! 

Well I’m blown away, what a sensational experience, as a VR Gamer that’s hugely into their music/Rhythm & Dance 🕺 games! 

This brings it all rolled into one! What a glorious Gem 💎 of a game! 

Lose yourself in the galaxies and free flow them dance moves! Yeah! Bust a move it got me moving baby!! 

This game is awesome you can call it a Rhythm game, a fitness game, a dance game! Hell you can even call it a mental health well being game, as I can see this helping people to “relax & unwind” 

There is no right or wrong way to ply this game, go with the flow “enjoy” yourself get moving release them Endorphins get your pituitary glad and hypothalamus in the brain 🧠 to go into over drive! 

Lower that stress and enhance your sense of well-being 🥰

This game brings it all in abundance! 

You won’t be disappointed all you dancers and rhythm nuts this is one for your library! 📚 it’s an every day “go to” game with masses of replay abilities. 

And to top it off the dev team are sooooo cool and fun! Jump into their Facebook community called “Official STARWAVE Community” 

I’m off to continue my intergalactic travels 😜

Fantastic Game 🥳

developer_response.body:
@TomPlayzVR -- We are so thrilled to have you be among the first pioneers on this Voyage with us! Your enthusiasm, your feedback, your expert insight, and your words mean the world to us. 

What you said here made us so happy: "you can call it a Rhythm game, a fitness game, a dance game! Hell you can even call it a mental health well being game, as I can see this helping people to “relax & unwind”

That's exactly where we have been aiming for STARWAVE. Something that stands in the middle of all of those descriptions, and something that never once penalizes you for enjoying yourself by getting into the headset and moving yourself to music on a regular basis. Good for the mind, good for the body, good for the soul. <3

So happy to have you with us, Tom. Grateful that you've been such a big part of kicking off our community, and excited for you to see where we're all headed next!

With much love and all the good vibes we can muster, THANK YOU!
- Team STARWAVE (via Job & Robin)

reviews.review_description: Like Beatsaber? Synth Riders? If so so this game is those but space themed, and it's incredible. Something I would appreciate would be the trails off the sabers to not look glitchy, but honestly, you barely even see them so idc

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the awesome review, gergity! <3
- Team STARWAVE

reviews.review_description: I got the free trial of this game at first to try it out. It is an arm workout for sure. After two songs my shoulders are on fire! The graphics are awesome too! My trial was only half over when I decided to buy the full version.

This is such a great experience to play. You get lost in stunning environments, and the soundtrack is amazing.

Fans of Rhythm Games are going to enjoy this.

P.s. get ready for a workout 😜

reviews.review_title: Fun way to be active and move
reviews.review_description:
Starwave has you dancing with light sticks(?) and performing various moves to hit meteors and comets while music plays.

That’s a barebones description, but there is quite an experience in flying through outer space that makes the experience enjoyable while also getting a workout.  This is an easy way to get cardio activity in, since the focus is on the experience and you can just move without fearing that you’ll fail a level.  Also, compared with other apps, I can play this comfortably with limited space.

There are daily activities, and an active discord and Facebook group which is competitive on as fun way.

I strongly suggest checking out this app!
This game is amazing! So much fun and calorie burning too! You make it what you want with movement. Don’t miss out!

developer_response.body:
"MAKE IT WHAT YOU WANT WITH MOVEMENT"

Absolutely love your review! Thank you for the kind words, and welcome to the Voyage!

- Team STARWAVE (via JS and RO)

reviews.review_description: I thought maybe people were exaggerating how great this game is. Nope! It’s amazing. Hands down best music game I ever played and I own all of them. Graphics are just gorgeous, game play is spot on. It’s so good that I found myself adding some of the music on the game into my music library. And I don’t even listen to this genre of music. Blown away buy it!

developer_response.body:
"Hands down best music game I ever played and I own all of them" - mattproch 

This is so awesome to hear! We love that you're feeling the vibe of STARWAVE! We're super proud of our soundtrack and all of the music artists on deck. We wanted to curate a mood that blew us away as well, but felt like something fresh and new for most people to discover for the first time, despite the tracks being big underground hits. 

Means the world to get this review from you, and hoping you'll join us in the Official STARWAVE Community on FB, our Discord, or follow @playstarwave on social. Links to everything on playstarwave.com.

Sincerely appreciate having you voyage with us! Hope to see you on the Weekly Leaderboards!

--Team STARWAVE (via JS and RO)

reviews.review_description:
Starwave has become one of my main daily drivers for fitness apps. It’s just so well done. The music is popping, the moves are free and powerful, and the graphics are beautiful. You float through the universe dancing and smashing your way to victory. 

The dev is super involved and responsive too, with a nice community being built for support. 

This a no-brainer for anyone looking for a super fun way to burn some calories and get in shape, or simply to have a great time in VR. Just get it and thank me later 😉

The graphics are spectacular! So many different ones to play. I look forward to even more add-ons. 

Amazing!!!!

I can't shout it loud enough - the game is amazing!!  

If you like Synth Riders or Beat Saber, this game is for you!  

It's well done and stunning 🩷

developer_response.body:
We can't THANK YOU loudly enough! Your feedback means the world to us. Grateful for your review and your support in letting the world know what we're creating here! Much love from all of us. <3

---Team STARWAVE (via JS and RO)

reviews.review_description: All I can say for sure is how can you rate a game that has infinite stars amazing 🤩
deserves more sales the demo alone sold me, great music

developer_response.body: Aww. Thanks for the kind words! So happy you enjoyed the demo. Finding that 'FREE TRIAL' button on the store page can be a little tricky, but we hope everyone will give it a try at no cost before deciding it's for them. So happy you've found us. Welcome to the Voyage! - Team STARWAVE

reviews.review_description:
Still shots will not do this justice, this is not another BS/SR clone, this is total freedom of movement towards the targets with the same audio/visual vibe of Tetris Worlds

Just get it already!

developer_response.body:
Thank you FitnessMegamix for the amazing review and for recognizing the new innovations we bring to the genre! Means the world to us. <3

Now if we could only beat your top scores on the leaderboards...  ;)

Thanks for keeping US on our toes! Great having you on the Voyage with us. Welcome to the STARWAVE Community!

Sincerely,
Team STARWAVE (via JS and RO)

reviews.review_description: A visually stunning app with multiple avenues of enjoyment. Collect gems, ride the stars, dance and move in ways that suit you. Collecting constellations is my favourite part. Don't forget to visit your contellation gallery!!

As a lover of space, I already had a good feeling about this game. But then I seen the graphics and… I was BLOWN AWAY 🤩👏 I can’t wait to see what the devs do next. The constellation area is so calming and gorgeous. Even the song selection is fun to look at. If you are debating on getting this game, just do the free trial and thank me later 😉✨

Love this game so much. It complements Synthriders and Audio Trip beautifully. There are similarities, but it is different  enough to stand alone as a unique and beautiful experience. I can't stop smiling 😃
I like

reviews.review_title: Wow finally and that saved the VR
reviews.review_description: So finally an app that makes me keep my vrz I was just about to return it because of the Absolutely worthless apps out there this one makes me keep it this app alone is worth the price of a meta Quest 3 and by the way I am a middle age man

developer_response.body:
"WORTH THE PRICE OF A META QUEST 3"

WOW! Thank you so much for your kind words! Clearly STARWAVE has connected with you in a way that most other apps simply haven't just yet. We're so grateful that it's convinced you to hang onto your Quest, and would be so happy to welcome you into our Official STARWAVE Community on FB. 

Visit playstarwave.com for easy links to the group, and we hope to see you there connecting with more of the community. There are more 'middle age' folks flowing with us every day than you might think. ;)

Thanks again for the review, and we hope to see you in the stars!

Sincerely,
Team STARWAVE (via J.S. and R.O.)

reviews.review_description:
I'm the kind of guy who hates gyms and activities indoors. 
This app is pure fun!
Gives me the advantages of training indoors and the feeling to be outdoors.
Moreover, you train without realising it because it has the structure of a game. 
I'm a totally uncoordinated person in my movements, and this app is quickly improving my inexistent coordination without any effort but actually enjoying the task. 
I had thousands of doubts before buying the app because it was everything I disliked, but I'm glad I dared to buy it because today it's my favourite app, and it's helping to overcome many of my limits.

developer_response.body:
"PURE FUN... MY NEW FAVOURITE APP!"

WOW!!! Indeed, Frenzo! So happy it's hitting home for you, and so happy to have you flowing with us. We totally get what it's like to be an uncoordinated person, and we definitely designed this to be as easy as possible to get into the flow of having nonstop fun.

The more you overcome your limits, the more you'll realize they were probably never really there in the first place.  So happy you found us, and so happy to have you playing!
Be sure to join our Official STARWAVE Community on Facebook or Discord via links on playstarwave.com. 

Thanks again, and hope to see you there!

Sincerely,
Team STARWAVE via JS and RO

reviews.review_title: Best intuitive workout or fun escape!
reviews.review_description: I was lucky enough to be among the beta test group for this game and while I hestitate to use phrases like "life-changing"...I'm going there! Prescriptive fitness is just not for me, but I needed to get moving. Among the rhythym games, this one is a stand-out! Dance-able music, out of this world (literally) graphics and the freedom to get moving and get your heart rate up with your body's own strengths and limitations. Get it! Let's dance in space together!

I never leave reviews but this is a must  to have  in your collection !

This game makes me so happy ! The music and visuals are awesome plus I get to burn calories  while  having fun 🤩

"Starwave is a magical journey through musical space that manages to successfully fuse your soul with its wonderous soundtrack. Sure, some may be disappointed at its lack of a failure state, but its almost zen-like nature is almost certain to ease you of your troubles. Until you take the headset off, at least."

Full review over at The Elite Institute

developer_response.body:
Your review made the entire team smile and blush with joy and gratitude. 'Fusing Your Soul' with our soundtrack is at the core of all of our design in getting you to move your body to music. Every day. Thank you so much to The Elite Institute for this incredible review, and be sure to visit their site for a deeper expert analysis. Welcome to the Voyage! 
--Team STARWAVE (via JJS)
